name: Podcast Growth System
description: Launch or grow your podcast with a complete content, outreach, and promotion system
outcome: Double your downloads and land 3 guest features in 60 days

automation.action: Send email to list + post to LinkedIn and Instagram
automation.followUp: Share audiogram clip to Stories 3 days later
Tag guest in all social posts on publish day

assets.title: Guest Outreach Email
assets.content:
Subject: [Podcast Name] — Would love to have you on

Hey [Guest Name],

I've been following your work on [specific thing — their content, book, podcast, LinkedIn] and your take on [specific topic] is exactly what my audience needs to hear.

I host [PODCAST NAME] — a show for [audience description] focused on [your topic]. We've had guests like [1–2 notable past guests if applicable] and episodes regularly hit [download number or listener count].

I'd love to have you on for a [20/30/45]-minute conversation about:
• [Angle 1 — something they know deeply]
• [Angle 2 — a topic that fits your show's theme]
• [Angle 3 — a fresh take or story they haven't told elsewhere]

No prep required — I do all the editing, write the show notes, and send you a ready-to-share promo kit after we publish.

Would [month] work? Here's a link to book directly: [Calendly/scheduling link]

Either way, keep up the incredible work.

[Your Name]
[Podcast Name] | [Website]
[Social handle]

assets.title: Guest Follow-Up (No Reply)
assets.content:
Subject: Re: [Podcast Name] — quick follow-up

Hey [Guest Name],

Just circling back on my note from [X days] ago about coming on [PODCAST NAME].

Totally understand if the timing isn't right — but wanted to share one more thing:

I'm specifically recording an episode series on [THEIR TOPIC AREA] next month and your perspective on [SPECIFIC ANGLE] would be the perfect fit.

If now's not a good time, I'd love to add you to the list for [Q2/next quarter/after your book launch]. Would that work?

No pressure either way — just didn't want to miss the chance to feature you.

[Your Name]

assets.title: Show Notes Template
assets.content:
SHOW NOTES TEMPLATE
(Copy and customize for every episode)

---
EPISODE [NUMBER]: [EPISODE TITLE]

[1–2 sentence episode summary — what listeners will learn and why it matters]

---
IN THIS EPISODE:
• [Key takeaway 1]
• [Key takeaway 2]
• [Key takeaway 3]
• [Bonus insight or story covered]

---
ABOUT THE GUEST (for guest episodes):
[Guest Name] is [1–2 sentence bio]. Connect with [him/her/them] at [guest's website/social].

---
RESOURCES MENTIONED:
• [Resource 1]: [Link]
• [Resource 2]: [Link]
• [Free download or tool]: [Link]

---
TIMESTAMPS:
[0:00] — Introduction
[X:XX] — [Topic 1]
[X:XX] — [Topic 2]
[X:XX] — [Topic 3]
[X:XX] — Key takeaways + wrap-up

---
CONNECT WITH [YOUR NAME]:
• Website: [URL]
• Instagram: @[handle]
• LinkedIn: [URL]
• Work with me: [booking/sales link]

---
LOVE THE SHOW?
Leave a review on Apple Podcasts — it takes 30 seconds and helps more [your audience] find the show.
[Direct review link]

assets.title: New Episode Email to List
assets.content:
Subject: 🎙️ New episode: [Episode Title]

Hey [First Name],

New episode of [PODCAST NAME] is live — and this one is worth your full attention.

🎧 [EPISODE TITLE]
[Podcast link]

In this episode, [guest name / I] breaks down:
→ [Key insight 1]
→ [Key insight 2]
→ [Key insight 3]

The part that got me: [YOUR GENUINE REACTION — 1–2 sentences. Be specific.]

This episode is for you if:
• You've been struggling with [specific problem]
• You want [specific outcome] without [pain point]
• You're ready to [next step or transformation]

▶️ Listen here: [LINK]
⏱ [X] minutes — perfect for your commute or workout.

And if you've been meaning to leave a review — [direct Apple/Spotify link] takes 30 seconds and genuinely helps the show grow.

Enjoy it,
[Your Name]

P.S. Reply and tell me your biggest takeaway. I read everything.

assets.title: Cross-Promotion Email (to Guest's List)
assets.content:
Subject: I was just on [Your Name]'s podcast — here's the episode

[To be sent by your GUEST to their list]

Hey [First Name],

I had a great conversation recently with [YOUR NAME] on [PODCAST NAME] and wanted to share it with you.

We talked about [TOPIC] — specifically:
→ [Key point 1]
→ [Key point 2]
→ [Something personal or surprising from the conversation]

I think you'll find the [specific section/timestamp] especially useful if you're dealing with [problem].

🎧 Listen here: [EPISODE LINK]

[Guest's sign-off]

---
[Host note to guest when sending the promo kit:]
Hey [Guest Name]! Here's a ready-to-send email for your list if you'd like to share the episode. Feel free to edit it in your voice — just keeping the link intact is all I ask. Thank you!

assets.title: Social Promo Templates (3 Posts)
assets.content:
SOCIAL PROMO TEMPLATE — POST 1 (Publish Day)

🎙️ New episode out today!

[EPISODE TITLE]

In this one, [guest name / I] shares:
→ [Point 1]
→ [Point 2]
→ [Point 3]

[Provocative question or bold statement from the episode]

🔗 Link in bio / comments to listen

#podcast #[yourniche] #[yourtopic] #[audiencetype]

---
SOCIAL PROMO TEMPLATE — POST 2 (3 Days Later — Quote Pull)

"[Best quote from the episode]" — [Guest Name / Your Name]

This came from episode [#] of [PODCAST NAME].

If this resonated, the full conversation is [X] minutes and worth every second.

🎧 Link in bio to listen.

---
SOCIAL PROMO TEMPLATE — POST 3 (7 Days Later — Lesson Recap)

We dropped an episode last week that's still getting messages.

The #1 thing people took away:

[KEY INSIGHT IN 2–4 SENTENCES]

Haven't listened yet? Here's the link: [LINK]

And if you have — what was YOUR biggest takeaway? Drop it below 👇

assets.title: Listener CTA Scripts (In-Episode)
assets.content:
IN-EPISODE CTA SCRIPTS
(Use these word-for-word at natural breaks in your episodes)

---
CTA 1 — SUBSCRIBE (use in first 5 minutes)
"Before we dive in — if you're getting value from this show, hit subscribe wherever you're listening. It's the #1 way to make sure you never miss an episode, and it helps more [your audience description] find the show."

---
CTA 2 — REVIEW ASK (use mid-episode after a strong point)
"Quick pause — if what I just shared was useful, the best thing you can do is leave a review on Apple Podcasts. It takes less than a minute and it genuinely changes how many people can find this show. I read every single one."

---
CTA 3 — FREE RESOURCE (use when transitioning to a new topic)
"By the way — I put together a free [resource name] that goes deeper on exactly what we're talking about. You can grab it at [URL] — I'll also put the link in the show notes."

---
CTA 4 — WORK WITH YOU (use near the end)
"If you're serious about [desired outcome] and you want [your service/product], I work with [audience description] every month. The details are at [URL] — and if it feels like a fit, I'd love to talk."

---
CTA 5 — SHARE THE EPISODE
"Last thing — if you know someone dealing with [problem this episode solves], send them this episode. You might just change their day."
